title: Ch0nkPack
description: It is a modpack alright (formerly known as Ch0nkHeroes)
body:
(Formerly named "Superpower modpack ig" & "Ch0nkHeroes")
Adds a bunch of cool stuff to have a very cool minecraft experience. 😎
There will most likely be more features in the future.
# Modpack Features:
* NBC Heroes - Superpowers
* FSang Heroes - More Powers
* Alien Evo - Ben 10 Omnitrix
* Pantheon Sent - Moon Knight

* Ad Astra - Space
* Create - Technology
  * And some addons
* Traveler's Backpacks - Storage
* Tom's Simple Storage - More Storage
* Easy Villagers - Unethical Villager Practices

* Alex's Mobs - Mobs
* Handcrafted - Furniture 

* FTB Chunks - Land claiming (Flan is used prior to v3.4)

## Notice Ig
As of Version 3, the modpack will be merged with my other pack, Ch0nk Mechanics. The main difference being Ad Astra & some create mod addons being added.
